'''jatala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackeroony|smackeroony]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackeroony|smackeroony]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jatala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jætælæth|jætælæth]] || [[word:jætælæj|jætælæj]] || [[word:jætælæsh|jætælæsh]] || [[word:jætælæ|jætælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatatalath|jatatalath]] || [[word:jatatalaj|jatatalaj]] || [[word:jatatalash|jatatalash]] || [[word:jatatala|jatatala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatalath|jatalath]] || [[word:jatalaj|jatalaj]] || [[word:jatalash|jatalash]] || [[word:jatala|jatala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jataflath|jataflath]] || [[word:jataflaj|jataflaj]] || [[word:jataflash|jataflash]] || [[word:jataflaf|jataflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jatalatha|jatalatha]] || [[word:jatalaja|jatalaja]] || [[word:jatalasha|jatalasha]] || [[word:jatalaka|jatalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jatalath|jatalath]] || [[word:jatalaj|jatalaj]] || [[word:jatalash|jatalash]] || [[word:jatala|jatala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jatalathal|jatalathal]] || [[word:jatalajal|jatalajal]] || [[word:jatalashal|jatalashal]] || [[word:jatalakal|jatalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jatalathatha|jatalathatha]] || [[word:jatalajaja|jatalajaja]] || [[word:jatalashasha|jatalashasha]] || [[word:jatalaka|jatalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jatalathan|jatalathan]] || [[word:jatalajan|jatalajan]] || [[word:jatalashan|jatalashan]] || [[word:jatalakan|jatalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jatalathaoro|jatalathaoro]] || [[word:jatalajaoro|jatalajaoro]] || [[word:jatalashaoro|jatalashaoro]] || [[word:jatalakaoro|jatalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
